title: geranium obtusilobum
intro: Geranium obtusilobum, also known as the Sweet-scented geranium, is a species of flowering plant in the family Geraniaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Geranium obtusilobum include relief from menstrual cramps, anxiety, and insomnia, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce stress. Geranium obtusilobum can be prepared as a herbal tea, oil, or tincture for its medicinal uses, and is often used in aromatherapy for its calming effects.
